ham.subject: Your Order #12345678 has been Confirmed
ham.body:
Hello Rahul,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! Your order has been confirmed and is now being processed.

Order Number: 12345678
Items:
- 1x Wireless Mouse – ₹799
- 2x USB-C Cable – ₹499 each

Shipping Address:
Rahul Sharma
A-101, Green Tower
Sector 18, Noida

Estimated Delivery: 3-5 business days

If you have any questions or need to change the shipping address, please reply to this email or visit your order details page.

Thank you for choosing Amazon. Happy shopping!

Regards,
Amazon Customer Support

spam.subject: Urgent: Ticket ID 98765 - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have received a request to reset the password for your corporate account. This ticket is marked as high priority and requires your immediate attention.

Ticket ID: 98765
Action Required: Please verify your identity by clicking the link below within the next 24 hours.

<URL>

Failure to confirm your identity may result in temporary suspension of your account for security reasons.

If you did not initiate this request, please contact IT Helpdesk immediately at 1800-123-456.

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Regards,
IT Helpdesk Team
